props.name: children
props.description: The content to animate. If a string, it will be split into individual characters.

props.name: scrollContainerRef
props.description: Optional ref to the scroll container. Defaults to window if not provided.

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: Additional Tailwind classes for the container element.

props.name: textClassName
props.description: Additional Tailwind classes for the text element.

props.name: ease
props.description: Easing function used for the animation.

props.name: stagger
props.description: Delay between the animation start of each character.
